{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Mobile Content Creator",
  "description": "DualCore Careers is a recruitment and career support company dedicated to connecting employers with highly skilled remote and on-site professionals. We help businesses find the right talent while also empowering job seekers through CV optimization, LinkedIn enhancement, and career development services. Our goal is to bridge the gap between great talent and great opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Content Creator
Job Location:&nbsp;Ebute Meta, Mainland - Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (Hybrid &ndash; 3 times weekly on-site)
Duration: 1 month

Job Summary


	We are looking for a creative and proactive Mobile Content Creator to develop engaging content around an ongoing renovation project.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging video and photo content showcasing renovation progress
	Develop content that highlights the firm&rsquo;s work and brand
	Post content daily across designated platforms


Requirement


	Must be able to shoot and edit content using a mobile device.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cv, portfolio and cover letter to:&nbsp;dualcorecareers@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates must live on the mainland.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-05",

  },

Mobile Content Creator Job at DualCore Careers




        
    

        
        DualCore Careers is a recruitment and career support company dedicated to connecting employers with highly skilled remote and on-site professionals. We help businesses find the right talent while also empowering job seekers through CV optimization, LinkedIn enhancement, and career development services. Our goal is to bridge the gap between great talent and great opportunities.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Mobile Content Creator
Job Location: Ebute Meta, Mainland - Lagos
Employment Type: Contract (Hybrid – 3 times weekly on-site)
Duration: 1 month

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a creative and proactive Mobile Content Creator to develop engaging content around an ongoing renovation project.


Responsibilities


	Create engaging video and photo content showcasing renovation progress
	Develop content that highlights the firm’s work and brand
	Post content daily across designated platforms


Requirement


	Must be able to shoot and edit content using a mobile device.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cv, portfolio and cover letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates must live on the mainland.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "HR Manager (Compensation & Benefits Specialist)",
  "description": "Global Linkers Limited&nbsp;is a forward-thinking HR consulting firm dedicated to partnering with upcoming and medium-scale businesses to strengthen their people practices and achieve sustainable growth. We provide practical, cost-efficient HR solutions that streamline operations, enhance workforce capability, and allow business leaders to stay focused on their core priorities. By reducing administrative burden and improving productivity, we support organizations in unlocking their full potential with confidence and professionalism

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager (Compensation &amp; Benefits Specialist)

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and strategic HR Manager with a strong specialization in Compensation and Benefits to join our team in a manufacturing environment.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and managing competitive compensation structures and benefits programs that attract, retain, and motivate employees while ensuring compliance with relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities:


	Develop and implement compensation and benefits strategies aligned with organizational goals.
	Conduct salary benchmarking and market analysis to ensure competitive pay structures.
	Design, review, and manage employee benefits programs (health insurance, pensions, allowances, etc.).
	Oversee payroll processes and ensure accuracy and compliance with statutory requirements.
	Lead job evaluation and grading systems within the organization.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and industry regulations.
	Partner with leadership to support performance management and reward systems.
	Provide guidance to management on compensation policies and employee relations matters.
	Analyze HR metrics and prepare reports to support decision-making.
	Manage and mentor the HR team to drive efficiency and effectiveness.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	7&ndash;10 years of HR experience, with a strong focus on Compensation &amp; Benefits.
	Professional HR certification (CIPM, SHRM, or equivalent) is required.
	Mandatory experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of job evaluation methods and salary structuring.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and leadership skills.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;apply@globallinkersltd.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;HR Manager (Compensation &amp; Benefits Specialist)&quot; as the subject of the email.",

HR Manager (Compensation & Benefits Specialist) Job at Global Linkers Limited




        
    

        
        Global Linkers Limited is a forward-thinking HR consulting firm dedicated to partnering with upcoming and medium-scale businesses to strengthen their people practices and achieve sustainable growth. We provide practical, cost-efficient HR solutions that streamline operations, enhance workforce capability, and allow business leaders to stay focused on their core priorities. By reducing administrative burden and improving productivity, we support organizations in unlocking their full potential with confidence and professionalism

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: HR Manager (Compensation & Benefits Specialist)
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Manufacturing

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and strategic HR Manager with a strong specialization in Compensation and Benefits to join our team in a manufacturing environment.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and managing competitive compensation structures and benefits programs that attract, retain, and motivate employees while ensuring compliance with relevant regulations.


Key Responsibilities:


	Develop and implement compensation and benefits strategies aligned with organizational goals.
	Conduct salary benchmarking and market analysis to ensure competitive pay structures.
	Design, review, and manage employee benefits programs (health insurance, pensions, allowances, etc.).
	Oversee payroll processes and ensure accuracy and compliance with statutory requirements.
	Lead job evaluation and grading systems within the organization.
	Ensure compliance with labor laws and industry regulations.
	Partner with leadership to support performance management and reward systems.
	Provide guidance to management on compensation policies and employee relations matters.
	Analyze HR metrics and prepare reports to support decision-making.
	Manage and mentor the HR team to drive efficiency and effectiveness.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field.
	7–10 years of HR experience, with a strong focus on Compensation & Benefits.
	Professional HR certification (CIPM, SHRM, or equivalent) is required.
	Mandatory experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Strong knowledge of job evaluation methods and salary structuring.
	Excellent analytical, communication, and leadership skills.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "HR Manager (Compensation & Benefits Specialist)" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
